channel.title: How to deploy the files in the build folder to azure?
channel.description:
Hi there,
Just wondering if anyone has deployed the files from the build folder to azure server.
If yes, please guide me.
Thank you in advance.
Fernando

item.title: How to deploy the files in the build folder to azure?
item.dc:creator: nickelnext
item.description:
nobody ever replied. and there’s no mention on how to deploy on azure anywhere in the docs.

Read full topic
item.source: How to deploy the files in the build folder to azure?
